signal_watch.title: Chat SDK adds Novu support
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: Chat SDK now supports Novu with the new vendor-official adapter . One handler set puts your agent on Slack, Microsoft Teams, WhatsApp, Telegram, and email. Novu handles credentials, identity, and delivery, keeping OAuth and tokens outside your app and mapping each channel to one user. Your agent always knows who they're talking to. Your agent can also send proactive notifications and handle the replies in the same loop, on whichever channel the customer used. One CLI command
signal_watch.excerpt: Chat SDK now supports Novu with the new vendor-official adapter . One handler set puts your agent on Slack, Microsoft Teams, WhatsApp, Telegram, and email. Novu handles credentials, identity, and delivery, keeping OAuth and tokens outside your app and mapping each channel to one user. Your agent always knows who they're talking to. Your agent can also send proactive notifications and handle the replies in the same loop, on whichever channel the customer used. One CLI command

signal_watch.author: LangChain
signal_watch.summary: AI agents work best when they reflect the knowledge and judgment your team has built over time. clusters.title: Chat SDK adds Novu support
clusters.summary: Chat SDK now supports Novu with the new vendor-official adapter . One handler set puts your agent on Slack, Microsoft Teams, WhatsApp, Telegram, and email. Novu handles credentials, identity, and delivery, keeping OAuth and tokens outside your app and mapping each channel to one user. Your agent always knows who they're talking to. Your agent can also send proactive notifications and handle the replies in the same loop, on whichever channel the customer used. One CLI command

clusters.title: Human judgment in the agent improvement loop
clusters.summary: AI agents work best when they reflect the knowledge and judgment your team has built over time. Some of that is institutional knowledge that’s already documented and easy for an agent to use as-is. But most great organizations also rely on tacit knowledge that lives inside their employees’ minds.
